bugDescription: Manual resolution row controls inert: ignore, allowBlankTeacher, useExisting*, create*Candidate, weeklyHours, examType, ambiguousMapping did not update state or counters
rootCause: applyManualResolutionUpdate expected { resolution: {...} } wrapper but UI sent flat { course: {...} } patches, causing silent no-op
Shallow merge of nested resolution objects would have wiped siblings on subsequent patches (defense in depth fix)

fixSummary.patchShapeSupport: applyManualResolutionUpdate accepts both flat { course: {...} } and canonical { resolution: {...} } shapes
fixSummary.igniteRow: ignored: true → validation re-evaluates with blockers: ['rowIgnored']; resolutionStatus becomes 'ignored'
fixSummary.allowBlankTeacher: teacher.action = 'allowBlankTeacher' → teacherMissing blocker cleared if it was the only one
fixSummary.createCourseCandidate: course.candidateName captured; createCandidate planning branch in L6-E2
fixSummary.examTypeOverride: examType.value = '考试' | '考查' | ''; examTypeInvalid blocker cleared
fixSummary.planPayload: handleGeneratePartialPlan reads live resolutionItems and passes them to planCourseSettingPartialImport

verification.forbiddenFiles: clean (templates + migration SQL + temp/README.md legitimately tracked)
